# Ui.MayEmitUiSurface method

Returns `true` when the apps extension is in *activeSet* and the server MAY therefore emit its surface (the `_meta.ui` key, the `ui://` resource) for this interaction (spec §26.2, R-26.2-a).

```csharp
public static bool MayEmitUiSurface(IEnumerable<string> activeSet)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| activeSet | The identifiers active for this interaction. |

## Return Value

`true` when the UI surface may be emitted.
